BotSettings.Name: Discord Bot
BotSettings.Label: Configure Bot
BotSettings.Hint: Manage Discord bot integration and channel webhooks

Enabled.Name: Enable Bot Mode
Enabled.Hint: Use a Discord bot to manage webhooks automatically.

Token.Name: Bot Token
Token.Hint: Your Discord bot token. Keep this secret.

ProxyUrl.Name: CORS Proxy URL
ProxyUrl.Hint: Proxy for Discord API calls during bot setup. Run 'npm run proxy' for a local proxy, or deploy a Cloudflare Worker (see docs/cloudflare-proxy-setup.md). Only needed for Test Connection, Discover Channels, and adding channels — not for sending messages.

RpgSageAppId.Name: RPGSage Application ID
RpgSageAppId.Hint: The Discord application ID for RPGSage. Pre-filled with the official RPGSage ID. Only change this if you are self-hosting RPGSage.

DiscoveredChannels.Name: Discovered Channels
DiscoveredChannels.Hint: Cached list of channels discovered via RPGSage webhooks.

GameChannels.Name: Game Channels
GameChannels.Hint: Configured game channels with managed webhooks.

Instructions.Title: Bot Setup Instructions
Instructions.Step1: Go to the Discord Developer Portal and click New Application. Give it a name (e.g. "PBD-Tools") and click Create.
Instructions.Step2: In the left sidebar, click Bot. Click Reset Token, confirm, then copy the token. You will not be able to see it again. Enable the Server Members Intent under Privileged Gateway Intents if you want to look up Discord members for user mentions.
Instructions.Step3: In the left sidebar, click OAuth2. Under OAuth2 URL Generator, check the bot scope. Under Bot Permissions, check Manage Webhooks and View Channels (so the bot can resolve channel names). Copy the generated URL at the bottom, open it in your browser, select your Discord server, and authorize.
Instructions.Step4: Start a CORS proxy for bot setup. Either run npm run proxy locally, or deploy a Cloudflare Worker (see docs/cloudflare-proxy-setup.md for free setup). Enter the proxy URL below.
Instructions.Step5: Paste the bot token below and click Test Connection. Your Discord server name should appear. Then click Discover Channels to find channels where RPGSage has webhooks.
Instructions.Step6: Select a channel or thread and click + to add it. Configure the persona name and avatar for each channel.
Instructions.Step7: Check Enable Bot Mode and click Save. You can stop the proxy.

BotSettings.NoChannelsConfigured: No channels configured. Use Discover Channels above to find RPGSage channels, then add them here.

BotSettings.NoGuilds: Bot is not a member of any Discord servers.

BotSettings.TestFirst: Please test the connection first to detect your Discord server.
BotSettings.NoAppId: Please enter the RPGSage application ID.
BotSettings.DiscoveryFailed: Channel discovery failed. Check the bot token and RPGSage app ID.
BotSettings.WebhookCreateFailed: Failed to create webhook. Check bot permissions (Manage Webhooks).
BotSettings.WebhooksCleaned: All managed webhooks have been removed from Discord.
BotSettings.AddParentFirst: Add the parent channel before adding threads in it.

UserMentionConfig.Title: Player Character to Discord User Mentions
UserMentionConfig.Description: Map PCs to Discord users for @mentions. Use the bot lookup to select members from your server, or enter a Discord User ID manually. Add an alias (e.g. "Durg") to match short @mentions in posts.
UserMentionConfig.DescriptionUserID: Manual Discord User ID may be obtained by enabling developer mode and then copying the User ID.
UserMentionConfig.NoBotConfigured: Bot is not configured. Set up the bot in Game Channels first.
UserMentionConfig.FetchFailed: Failed to fetch Discord members. Check bot token and proxy.

channel.label: Channel
channel.hint: Post will be sent to this channel on Discord.

content.label: Content
content.hint: Message content to be posted to Discord.

once.label: Once
once.hint: Disable the behavior after the first time it's triggered.

pause.label: Pause
pause.hint: Pause the game when the behavior is triggered. Requires GM to be connected.
